Created attachment 144202
py-sqlalchemy.diff

Updated databases/py-sqlalchemy to latest version 0.9.6. Please note, that databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel should probably be deprecated as it doesnt seem to be any other version than 0.9.6 currently.

http://pd.valinor.palantiri.org/data/latest-per-pkg/py27-sqlalchemy/0.9.6/
